title: IdeaSubmission
description: A community roadmap idea — either an infrastructure/feature request or a proposal for new data.

title.description: Short, descriptive title for the idea.

summary.description: Description and use case (Infrastructure) or scientific justification and precedents (New Data).

submitter.description: Synapse username of the submitter. Populated server-side from the authenticated session.

submitterId.description: Numeric Synapse user ID of the submitter. Populated server-side from the authenticated session.

ideaType.description: Top-level category: an infrastructure/feature improvement or a proposal for new data in the portal.

priority.description: Submitter's rough priority estimate. Defaults to Medium if omitted.

focusArea.description: Which 5-year roadmap workstream this idea aligns with.

affectedUserType.description: User type most impacted, e.g. Researcher, Patient, Clinician.

suggestedFunding.description: Suggested funding source for this idea.

targetDate.description: Planned delivery quarter, e.g. Q3 2026. Set by the NF-OSI team.

completedDate.description: Quarter in which the idea was completed, e.g. Q2 2026. Set when status transitions to Completed.
